inputs: docTableRows for table row count summary
markdownV1Contract.output: Markdown string beginning with '# OCR 결과'
structure: Markdown table header: No / field label / value / confidence / adoption
one table row per edited field
markdownV1Contract.labelRule: resolveFieldLabel primary + optional secondary in parentheses
markdownV1Contract.valueRule: non-table fields use field.value escaped for pipe and newline
markdownV1Contract.tableRule: table fields output only a summary like '표 데이터(N행)' when docTableRows exists; structured tableRows are not expanded
markdownV1Contract.rowIndexRule: Markdown v1 does not render table columns, so rowIndex include/exclude policy is not directly visible in Markdown output
markdownV1Contract.copyExport: Preview mode selects toMarkdown() for markdown copy/export; Clean JSON path is separate
markdownV1Contract.lineEndingFixtureRule: fixtures are stored with LF line endings

beforeAfterValidation: Normalize line endings to LF before comparison
Do not trim trailing newline unless the current output changes explicitly
